app.title: Family Wishlist
app.selectWishlistDescription: Select a family member's wishlist or view all wishes

auth.profilePictureHint: Enter a URL for your profile picture (jpg, jpeg, png, or webp)
auth.invalidImageUrl: Please enter a valid image URL (jpg, jpeg, png, or webp)
auth.usernameRequirements: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens

wishlist.title: Title

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{title}}? This action cannot be undone.

wishlist.noWishes: No wishes found. Add some wishes to get started!

tips.addWish: Click the Add New Wish button to create your wishlist
tips.switchLists: Click on a user's avatar to view their wishlist
tips.priority: Priority items are marked with a star

createList.title: Create Your Wishlist
createList.description: Add items you'd love to receive. Include details like price and priority.

viewLists.title: View Family Wishlists
viewLists.description: Browse through your family members' wishlists to find the perfect gift.

shopping.title: Easy Shopping
shopping.description: Click on item links to go directly to where they can be purchased.
